node.text: China Moutai wishes a happy #ChineseNewYear to friends all over the world! #MoreWishes

🌏📢A worldwide broadcast: we’re going to look for another place to distil Moutai. All the necessary environmental information listed in the video. Will you join our journey? #MoreSurprise
Let’s go! #China

node.text: Chinese cuisine can be divided into eight major cuisines, which represent the eating habits of different regions in China, showing the passion of Chinese people for delicacy. Following Moutai's steps to sense the profundity of Chinese food culture. #ThisisMoutai #MoreInspiration

node.text: Thanks to the apprenticeship program in Moutai Group, that Moutai Liquor can keep the same taste for so many years. Do you have any mentors in your career? Tell us your stories! 🤗#MoutaiPeople #mountainstories

node.text: This is a “fiery” drink, 🔥born in an aromatic and mountainous town in southwest China, and earned fame worldwide. Wanna know more about this drink? Just watch this video! 😍#MoutaiLegend #MoutaiDiscover #MoutaiStory

node.text:
Why residents in Moutai Town call the aroma as “Mammoth” in their hometown, while there are no mammoths at all?🧐
Find the answer in this video!
#MoutaiLegend #MoutaiExplore #MoutaiPeople

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on February 18, 2026. May be an image of poster and text.

node.text:
The taste of Chinese New Year, brought to life.
Crafted as golden sugar dragon and phoenix,
refined into the pure aroma of Moutai.
When craftsmanship meets Chinese New Year,
every wish for life returns gently, one sip at a time.

#SugarPainting #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #ChineseCrafts  #TheArtofAChineseToast

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on February 17, 2026. May be an image of fish and text.

node.text:
Spring arrives with rain on the land and lanterns alive with celebration.
Fish Lantern Parade delivers fortune to every gathering home.
Time distilled into every drop, warming every shared table.
Across mountains and seas, Moutai toasts with the world. 
Near or far, we gather to begin a new chapter of spring.

#FishLanternParade #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #RainWater #24SolarTerms #TheArtofAChineseToast

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on February 16, 2026. May be an image of ‎chopsticks and ‎text that says '‎MOUTAI 贵州菜台 KWEICHOW KWEICHOWMOUTAI KWE MOUTAI PENNING.ANENCHAPIER NEW CHAPTER PENNINGA ج ン 2 THE IE ΤΙ FIRSI DAY 初 OF CHINESENEWYEAR YE YEAR AR CHINESE NEW‎'‎‎.

node.text:
Write Spring Festival couplets and paste them by the door to bring blessings.
The red ribbon tied around the Moutai is like a hand-tied wish, passing on good fortune.
As the new year begins, mellow aromas unfold.
May luck endure, and peace accompany every year.

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #SpringFestivalCouplets #TheArtofAChineseToast

node.text:
East to West. Homeland to horizons. 
Moutai crosses time zones and seas - pouring Chinese New Year wishes into glasses worldwide.
Your festive moments, our honored presence.
Wherever you roam, we toast to reunion. 🥃✨

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #HappyNewYear

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on February 15, 2026. May be an image of chow mein, chopsticks and text that says 'ACAЛP 贵州茅台 KWEICHOW KWEICHOWMOUTA ΜΟ CHINESE タ 除 NEW YEAR'S EVE'.

node.text:
Chinese New Year’s Eve. 
Lights glow in every home, as the taste of the New Year moves from table to table. 
Within, the warmth of home. 
Beyond, the spirit of the New Year in full celebration. 
Moutai raises a glass with the world, welcoming the new year together. 

#NewYearsEve #Moutai #ChineseNewYear #FamilyReunionDinner

node.text:
Moutai’s global journey is moving from being seen to being truly understood.
To fashion designer Ben Fusari, it represents an uncompromising devotion to detail.
To Italian bartender Filippo Sanchi, it is a beautifully balanced creation.
When craftsmanship transcends language and geography, one glass becomes a shared resonance across the world.
As the Chinese New Year approaches, raise a glass of Moutai to all who dedicate themselves to the craft of living.

#Moutai #ChineseNewYear #SpringFestival #SharedMoments

Fassion Proof ஆ. 59% The ν.c 100% HeApa 告州芽台 에 KWEICHOWMOUTAI KWEICHOW MOUTAI‎'‎‎.

node.text:
A letter speaks, love echoes.
Romance needs no fanfare — just a note, a seal, a glass of fine liquor.
Roses perfume the gentle years; a ring seals a lifetime of devotion.
As the wax seal is solemnly pressed, the richness of 53% vol holds 100% sincerity.
This moment, a testament to love, becomes eternity.

#Moutai #ValentinesDay #ToastToLove

Family Reunion B.Friends B. اللل Friends Gathering, Gathering c. Business ၀၄ mAoa Connections D Me, Myself & Peace DEFINE YOUR CHOOSE YOUR SCENE WIITEMOUTAI WIITI NEW YEAR MOMENT‎'‎‎.

node.text:
Every New Year moment has its own meaning.
And Moutai is there — in just the right way.

From lively family gatherings,
to quiet smiles between old friends,
from meaningful business moments,
to a calm glass enjoyed alone.

This Chinese New Year, we invite you to choose ONE New Year scene with Moutai from the image — A, B, C, or D.

📌 Comment with: Your choice (A / B / C / D) + the reason why
🎁 6 lucky participants will receive a $10 Amazon Gift Card!

Define your New Year moment and let this glass mark it.

#ChineseNewYear #NewYearMoment #SceneWithMoutai

node.text:
Morning mist rises, and the land slowly warms. In China’s Chishui River Valley, craftsmen follow the guidance of season and experience, welcoming the first light of spring and the quiet awakening of Moutai’s aroma.

#Moutai #StartOfSpring #24SolarTerms

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on January 25, 2026. May be an image of poster, lantern, jug and text that says 'MOUTAI WARMTH PASSED ΟΝ C4090 И MOUTAI 洲美今酒 谷 KИECHOИ LABAR 腊 FESTIVAL'.

node.text:
Laba Festival marks a warm beginning to the Chinese New Year.
In fleeting moments of time, mellow aroma lingers at the fingertips.
Moutai, with handcrafted devotion, awaits the promise of a new year.

#Moutai #LabaFestival

node.text:
Retrace the glorious journey of 2025 with Moutai.
Time witnesses the honors, and the world rewards the endeavors.

#Moutai #2025Honors #SpiritOfTheAge #ToastingTheWorld

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Moutai China on December 31, 2025. May be an image of napkin ring, champagne, toast, tablecloth, placemat, magazine and text.

node.text:
By candlelight, a fine spirit marks the moment.

As 2026 begins,
a toast of Moutai opens the first chapter of the new year.

#Moutai #HappyNewYear #AToastTo2026
